repo_prior_art.cite: none; API.md §3 has no active ExactID data-fusion entry

published_prior_art.cite: LeeGhassamiShpitser2024DataFusionSelection: general SS-ID algorithm; TikkaHyttinenKarvanen2021DoSearch: general multiple-source do-search

repo_prior_art.cite: none; eid_proximal_phase and eid_frontdoor_multi_mediator are proxy/mediator kernels, not selected k-source observational overlap

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no catalogue source-cover certificate to reduce

published_prior_art.cite: ShpitserPearl2008CompleteID and CorreaTianBareinboim2018Adjustment cover the limiting formulas, not this certificate reduction

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses LeeBareinboim2020PartialObservability, a very close ICML 2020 paper on identification from partially observed distributions with different measured variable sets; it must be separated from the selected-margin/source-overlap hedge claim.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1 / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposal has not pinned whether \(\mathcal C\)-clauses equate ordinary observational conditionals or nested/fixing c-factor kernels; the ID-recursion c-factor requests are not generally ordinary \(P(A\mid B)\) conditionals, so source-coverability is underdefined.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add LeeBareinboim2020PartialObservability to §5 and to the Conjecture 1 comparison table, explaining exactly why partial-observability algorithms do not already provide selected-source overlap hedges with factor-local invariance clauses.

Rewrite the locked parameters and §6 so every \(\mathcal C\)-clause is typed as either an ordinary source conditional or a nested Markov/fixing kernel, with an explicit map from source laws to the district factors requested by the ID recursion.

Promote the three-source boundary template into a concrete algebraic corollary candidate: specify the binary response-function linear system and the nonzero free direction that would change \(P_x(Y)\) while preserving all listed pairwise source margins.

recommended_next_step: Revise the kernel typing of \(\mathcal C\) and add the missing partial-observability comparator before accepting the flagship proposal.
